name: wingman
description: Cross-platform AI engineering plugin for execution, context, and reuse.

interface.shortDescription: Execution, memory, and reuse workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Wingman packages reusable engineering skills for contract alignment, durable project memory, reuse selection, and explicit refactor workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Wingman to load project context before this refactor.
Use Wingman to decide whether an existing implementation should be reused.
